title: Anak ni Waray vs anak ni Biday
original_title: Anak Ni Waray Vs Anak Ni Biday
overview: Susie (Snooky) and Amy (Maricel) play the daughters of Ilocano Manang Biday and Visayan Inday Waray, characters made famous by 1950s movie queens Gloria Romero and Nida Blanca. Follows 1954 film Waray-waray.
